title: Environment Agency corporate scorecards 2025 to 2026
body: "We update the Environment Agency executive directors and the board every 3 months on corporate scorecard progress. Our corporate scorecard enables us to monitor how well we (the Environment Agency) are achieving our stated aims as set out in the Environment Agency action plan. We also share this with the Department for Environment, Food and Rural Affairs (Defra).  Quarterly reporting periods for 2025 to 2026   quarter 1 starts 1 April 2025 and ends 30 June 2025 quarter 2 starts 1 July 2025 and ends 30 September 2025 quarter 3 starts 1 October 2025 and ends 31 December 2025 quarter 4 starts 1 January 2026 and ends 31 March 2026   Note: the year end is 31 March 2026. "
